description_long: This refrigerator features a playful, cartoon-like design with a two-tone color scheme: the upper section is light gray with large, round black eyes and a stylized mouth, while the lower section is a vibrant blue. The front door is slightly ajar, revealing a beige interior with molded shelves for storage. The handle is a small, white, protruding piece located on the right side of the blue section. The back of the refrigerator is black with vertical ridges, likely for heat dissipation. The overall shape is rectangular with rounded edges, and the exterior finish appears smooth and glossy. The whimsical face design on the front gives it a unique, characterful appearance suitable for playful or themed urban environments.
description: A whimsical, cartoon-faced refrigerator with a blue and gray color scheme, smooth glossy finish, and a small white handle. The door is open, revealing a beige interior with shelves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cartoon face, blue lower section, white handle, and partially open door.
description_view_1: Side view with the door fully open, exposing the beige interior shelves and the thickness of the door.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a black, vertically-ridged back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the closed side of the refrigerator and the handle's placement.
attribute_brand_logo: There is a stylized text logo on the upper right front of the refrigerator, in black, but the brand name is not clearly legible.
attribute_door_handle_style: Small, white, protruding handle located on the right side of the blue section of the door.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Vertical ridged pattern on the black rear panel.
